name: Hybrid Analysis API
description: Hybrid Analysis provides a free malware analysis service powered by CrowdStrike Falcon Sandbox. The API allows submitting files and URLs for analysis, searching for existing reports, and accessing threat intelligence feeds. A User-Agent header (e.g. 'Falcon Sandbox') is recommended. Rate limits are returned in Api-Limits, Submission-Limits, Quick-Scan-Limits, and Sample-Download-Limits response headers. API keys have authorization levels: restricted, default, elevated, and super.
